title: Engine API: viewer element, src loading, diagnostics UI
description: Implement the 04-engine-api surface after Stage 4: <archmap-viewer>, external src with src_fetch_failed, diagnostics target/panel, SVG pan/zoom controls, and viewer UI state without reparsing.
triage_notes: Engine API advanced: <archmap-viewer src> now fetches external ArchMap source with src priority; failed loads emit src_fetch_failed diagnostics and show diagnostics, with inline fallback only when fallback-to-inline is present. render(model,{diagnosticsTarget}) and viewer diagnostics/diagnostics-target render diagnostics summary/list to an internal panel or external element. Added fetch/diagnostics helpers and tests. Verification: typecheck, test (87), build pass. Remaining: configurable console diagnostics, controls UI, SVG pan/zoom/fit/reset behavior; those continue through TASK-006/TASK-007.
